name: EventsSearchRequest
description: Request body for searching events using the Events Explorer query language

filter.description: Filter configuration for the event search

query.description: A Datadog events search query to filter events by text, tags, and attributes

from.description: The start of the search time range as an ISO 8601 timestamp or relative time

to.description: The end of the search time range as an ISO 8601 timestamp or relative time

sort.description: Sort order for the returned events

page.description: Pagination settings for the event search results

cursor.description: Cursor token from a previous response to retrieve the next page

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return per page
